name: manage_playbook
description: Create, update, list, get details of, add citations to, or delete a playbook. A playbook is a composable collection of evidence cards with annotations.

title.description: Title for creating or updating a playbook

description.description: Description for creating or updating a playbook

body_md.description: Markdown body content for updating a playbook (alias for description)

playbook_id.description: Playbook ID for get, update, delete, or add_citation
